taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Python, LangChain, pandas, Generative AI, Machine Learning
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, LangChain:1.0, Pandas:1.0, Generative AI:1.0, Machine Learning:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's, Master's, or higher degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related fields, 2–4 years of industry experience in data science, machine learning, or applied AI (or 1–2 years with an advanced degree), with experience contributing to production systems or product features, Strong knowledge of Python is a must, Ideally comfortable with LangChain, pandas and other GenAI related python libraries, Strong hands-on skills in AI & ML service development, end-to-end product engineering, and data analytics, Experience with GenAI and cloud technologies, Ability to translate business and customer problems into technical solutions, and to iterate based on user feedback and data, Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams, Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities, with a strategic mindset and a passion for driving product vision and business outcomes through technology, Experience thriving in dynamic, fast-paced environments, preferably within SaaS or technology-driven companies focused on customer and product innovation
core_responsibilities: Contribute to the development of AI-powered product features, from prototyping and experimentation through production delivery, deployment and iteration, Build and improve AI/machine learning, especially LLM-based systems (e.g., copilots, conversational workflows, or agent-style experiences) using established frameworks and internal platforms, Work with product and design teams to understand user needs and translate them into practical AI-driven solutions, Partner with engineers, designers, and other data scientists to build, test, and refine AI features, balancing model performance, system reliability, and user experience, Help define and analyze metrics to evaluate model performance, product usage, and customer impact, and use data to guide improvements
job_summary: Seismic is the global leader in AI-powered enablement, empowering go-to-market leaders to drive strategic growth and deliver exceptional customer experiences. As a Data Scientist II, you will design, build, and ship AI-powered product features, working closely with product managers, engineers, and other data scientists to develop end-to-end AI solutions that provide real customer value.
